name: sherpa-container
description: Dashboard card with header, metrics, and data sections. Content sourced from a content template (data-content) or inline child markup (fallback).

data-content.description: Content template id — fetches /html/templates/content/<id>.html at init

title.description: Container heading text (overrides content template title)

data-col-span.description: Column span in the content grid

data-row-span.description: Row span in the content grid

data-menu-open.description: Whether the context menu is open

slots.metric: Child sherpa-metric elements (auto-created from content template or authored inline)
slots.section: Child sherpa-base-table or sherpa-barchart elements (auto-created from content template or authored inline)

methods.getColSpan(): Get current column span from data-col-span attribute
methods.getRowSpan(): Get current row span from data-row-span attribute
methods.applyFilterState(filterState): Apply filter bar state to sections and metrics
